name: [ACCOUNT-06/09/10/11] Complete account settings provider and native branch coverage
description: Track the remaining account-settings pass-with-issues rows where Chrome/source checks passed but native or provider-driven branches were not deterministically exercised.
acceptanceCriteria: ACCOUNT-06 avatar/media branch has deterministic native-safe evidence or an explicit blocked rationale; ACCOUNT-09 age/security boundary branches are covered; ACCOUNT-10 export regional/provider branch is covered or fixture-backed; ACCOUNT-11 delete-account confirmation/provider branch is covered; master flow plan rows reference this item.
riskImpact: Without a tracker item these pass-with-issues rows can disappear from remediation planning, leaving account settings/provider branch coverage permanently source-checked only.
